MOTION To Compel Pltf'S Response To Deft'S 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories And 1st Set Of Requests For The Production Of Documents And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And His Counsel (Ccp 2030, 2031, 2032)
Off Calendar Apr-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel a further response to Special Interrogatory 37 is denied in part and granted in part. Special Interrogatory 37 is modified as follows:
"Except for this action, in the last 10 years has Plaintiff filed an action or made a written claim or demand related to harassment, discrimination, civil rights violations, violations of the California civil code, negligence, slander, assault, battery, or infliction of emotional distress? If so, for each action, claim, or demand state:
a) the date, time, and place and location of the incident;
b) the name, address, and telephone number of each person against whom the claim was made or action filed;
c) the court, names of the parties, and case number of any action filed;
d) the name, address, and telephone number of any attorney representing you;
e) whether the claim or action has been resolved or is pending."
Defendant is ordered to serve a complete verified response within 21 days of notice of this order.
2) Defendant's motion to compel a further response to Document Request No. 19 is denied.
3) The Court finds that plaintiff acted with substantial justification by objecting to the requested discovery. As drafted, the requests seek information that is irrelevant to the subject matter of this action. Requesting all grievances or complaints of any sort made in the past 20 years is clearly overbroad. In addition, counsel for defendants failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to informally resolve the matters in dispute by failing to respond to the March 9, 2005 letter wherein plaintiff offered to narrow the scope of the request. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2005 Set For Trial On Sep-06-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-19-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501
